response.overview: This is a musical drama. Intertwined with Ghanaian local palm wine tunes, SWEET PALM WINE follows the narrative of a family of three who go to live in their old apartment in the village due to the economic hardship and their inability to meet the standard of living in the city. Esi, their daughter is extremely disappointed at this change of environment later did she know that taking a step into your old living to strategies in life isn't bad after all when she falls madly in love with the chief's son who had a lot of prestige. It's a musical journey with scenes motivated by lyrics by kwanpa's (a leading Ghanaian palm wine music band) EP.
response.tagline: Agoo, it’s time to have the experience you have been waiting for; first ever in the Ghanaian cinema, Music, dance and Love all in this phenomenal Musical Drama that will keep you off your feet.
response.title: Sweet Palm Wine

results.name: Sweet Palm Wine (Ghana Movie Trailer) ft: Kwan Pa, Aaron Adatsi, Fred Amugi, Pascaline Edwards
